creator: amutu@amutu.com
text:
Created attachment 182959
busybox-1.26.2.diff v2

PORTSCOUT=	skipv:1.26.0

This is wrong this line is made to prevent portscout.freebsd.org to bug you about a given version in case of updates. Ignoring 1.26.0 would be useless after the upgrade.
---fixed

You removed all the PLIST_FILES so nothing will be packaged
---fixed.I missed pkg-plist file in the diff
